productDisplayName: Puma Men Ferrari Logo Red Tshirts
description: CompositionRed T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, ferrari logo printed on the chest with embroidery, Ferrari logo embroidered on the right sleeve and puma logo printed on the left sleeveFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureWarm ironDo not dry cleanThe simple cut, rosso corsa red, patent of Ferrari, and the logos make this T-shirt from puma an endorsement in itself. The logo shines bright on your chest, while the fabric wicks the sweat away offering exemplary comfort.
